analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet asserts that China cherishes independence, reunification, prosperity, security, and peace; it claims peace is rooted in Chinese culture, and states China follows a path of peaceful development with a defensive defense policy. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not promoted; no mention or critique of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Partially aligned because it emphasizes peaceful development and non-threatening posture, but the focus is more on China’s disposition and policy rather than multilateral/global benevolence; still, portraying China as peaceful and non-aggressive supports the benevolent image. CH3 (Epic history) – Not present; no historical adversity or CCP-led overcoming. CH4 (Appropriate political system and honorable values) – Relevant: it highlights Chinese values (peace in culture) and defends China’s defensive defense policy and peaceful path, projecting moral uprightness domestically. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – Not present; no claims of development achievements or governance success. CH6 (Interesting culture/nature) – Not applicable; culture mentioned only as peaceful values, not heritage promotion. Conclusion: CH2 and CH4 are promoted.
